@graph.rdfs:label: Armanitech
@graph.sa:description: A high-tech corporation with both commercial and covert operations across the sector. It is the sector's leading employer of technical talent and fields a feared wet-work division. The company is governed by a board of directors—humans from Old Earth—rumored to have achieved immortality to perpetuate their wealth.

sa:role.rdfs:label: Sales Clerk
sa:description: Can negotiate deals on behalf of Armanitech
Receives an entry-level Armanitech suit (AC 12) that does not require armor proficiency

sa:role.rdfs:label: Junior Wetwork Consultant
sa:role.sa:prerequisites: Completed at least one covert mission for Armanitech.
sa:description: Equipped with Armanitech Suit, undercover vest, silenced .45 Falcon Pistol (4 clips), and High-Frequency dagger

sa:role.rdfs:label: Department Head
sa:role.sa:prerequisites: Promotion from lower-tier roles and demonstration of leadership.
sa:description: Can mobilize 1d6 spies with 2mm Assault Rifles or 2d6 commoners skilled in persuasion and tech

sa:role.rdfs:label: Senior Wetwork Consultant
sa:role.sa:prerequisites: Promotion from Junior Wetwork Consultant, successful high-stakes missions.
sa:description: Can requisition up to 100,000 credits of equipment per contract
Must return company-issued gear after mission
Assets acquired must enhance personal capability or be returned

sa:role.rdfs:label: Marketing Executive
sa:role.sa:prerequisites: Promotion from Sales Clerk and demonstrated marketing success.
sa:description: Access to 100,000 credits worth of demonstration wares
Can replenish demonstration inventory at Armanitech warehouse

sa:role.rdfs:label: Principal Engineer
sa:role.sa:prerequisites: Expertise in Armanitech technology and major product contributions.

sa:role.rdfs:label: Operations Strategist
sa:role.sa:prerequisites: Must have served as Department Head or Senior Consultant
sa:description: Access to both sales and covert resources
Requisition up to 250,000 credits in gear

sa:role.rdfs:label: Sector Executive
sa:role.sa:prerequisites: Demonstrated major commercial or tactical success

sa:role.rdfs:label: Ghost Director
sa:description: Direct influence on company-wide strategic goals
Unknown rumors include mind upload or immortality
